note: Standalone microbench median (do_bench, return_mode='median') on GB10 sm_121, bf16, residual-fused RMSNorm. x shape (1,512,2048), residual (512,2048), weight (2048,). This is the codegen-vs-codegen baseline the harness uses for speedup_vs_inductor. The profiler-aggregate value (258.8 us) covers many call sites and is NOT directly comparable. Source: extract/microbench_inductor.json (key 'rmsnorm_us').
